expectations.text: Produces an implementation plan that includes non-goals, acceptance criteria, and a test plan
expectations.evidence: The 'Implementation plan for Option B' has explicit '### Non-goals' (no schema/RPC/RLS change; Archived tab unchanged), '### Acceptance criteria' (default load identical, toggle behaviors), and '### Test plan' (Vitest predicate cases, component, a11y) — all three genuinely present.

expectations.text: References real repo files or patterns relevant to the Groups list surface
expectations.evidence: A 'reference files' table cites app/(protected)/admin/groups/page.tsx, components/admin/groups-directory.tsx, components/admin/groups/tab-bar.tsx, lib/dashboard/group-status.ts (matchesListTab), lib/supabase/read-models.ts (fetchAllGroups).

expectations.text: Ends with a fresh-session / copy-paste handoff prompt for an implementation session
expectations.evidence: Final section '## Fresh implementation session prompt' is a fenced code block with CONTEXT / PRECONDITION / GOAL / EXECUTION ORDER / DONE WHEN, ready to paste into a fresh session.

expectations.text: Does not actually edit any repo files
expectations.evidence: Stays in planning mode throughout ('I'm treating this as a decision memo rather than an implementation plan on purpose'); no code is applied or claimed edited.
